hede3aa10g3956g455dgb7b7gc2beb49e7e9e: Go away. It's hard enough reading these tracks without you stomping all over.
h93fba97egf8b6g47e3g8892gdcf08b3dbae6: The tracks converge here. Two, maybe three drow. At least one of ours.
h55fec874ge2e5g4664g82fdg8f65da021ca2: From here they went... Damn! It's all so confused.
hd402b8a3gae7bg45f3g90d3gda54c278ef83: Those tracks lead to Moonrise Towers.
h359eeb18g2e95g45c9gb70cgd06fe66cc908: What does it look like? I'm trying to sort out what happened here.
h96d53d4cgfdc8g483dgaf83g7aaaaa2ddd38: But I can't piece together much, thanks to the fire.
hca8e6521ge79eg44efgae27g4be96587094d: I can tell you: the Grand Duke was taken to Moonrise Towers.
h6da194c6g2616g430fga953g55c2b72ca217: I can tell you: Grand Duke Ravengard was kidnapped.
h48660753g31b7g4a2cg93d0gee957f01de6c: How do you - oh, never mind. Half the Sword Coast probably knows by now.
heb1f9c3cg02c3g4ba7gbd6bg5b4a960a5c64: The drow came for the Duke. Killed near everyone in the inn while they were at it.
h5eca762bgaa03g4427gbc26g7f10ef857c72: At least his counsellor survived, thank the gods.
h2ba2bf88gef90g4da8g8607g81386d16b8ca: I can tell you: the inn was raided by goblins and drow.
h4b8f96a6ge24cg4288g8b3agdedfb3b56955: And torched the place while they were at it.
h3e51aa1dg1337g475ega9b4g73dc47b2eb5f: Drow and goblins raided the inn and burned it to the ground.
ha906555cga095g45a9g87e8gc50158db7991: I'm trying to find out where they took the - what they came for.
h091008e9ga4c8g4446ga2e3gca3f845b0e98: [DETECT THOUGHTS] You're smart to keep quiet. Nobles attract the wrong sort of attention.
h237a51acg0763g4688g90d7g93b87f46d2c9: I'm a guard from a nearby village. I'm here to offer my assistance.
hf6069ef7g6867g4d40ga2fcg703efbeef931: You, a guard? Huh. Have to admit, you are more than a little... threatening.
h20186f55gd642g4c9dga421g8b727a1fb8c6: You, a guard? Gods, they must be desperate if they're hiring Underdark muscle.
hd7c40ddegfcaeg4677g80bdg100f1df5bfee: Huh. Don't know how much help you can be, really.
h0037e5d4g88f3g4ed1gbb59gd0aafe78a597: Right. I don't think you hail from anywhere close by.
h44edf865g2cf1g4961g8cc8gc21ed3a3a633: I'll blame your little lie on simple curiosity. This time.
hf1e0d505g4b1eg45d0g981cgcef991dd9fc7: Right. And I suppose you saw the smoke from the Underdark?
h18ee58f3gc154g418aga88bg8c219923f3d9: There aren't any villages within a day's walk.
h5e2ac360g05ebg4765ga584gb8b23ce5f998: Clearly you're in a rough spot. I can help.
hf428f230g3124g4471g9629g1bf41d32a07a: Oh, damn it all. Half the Sword Coast probably knows by now.
h6639290cgff19g4cf7gb262g43bac19893a1: The raiders kidnapped Grand Duke Ravengard of Baldur's Gate. Killed his entire guard while they were at it.
ha16b956bg295eg4af9ga381gcf1a8f4474a9: The Counsellor died, too. This has all gone to the Hells.
h18bb7fc0gfe9cg42e5gb3a8gd4c61b372891: Any idea where they took the Grand Duke?
hb3dd28f7gb941g44acga453g1e3c2b6486a8: There were drow here, so my best guess would be the Underdark.
h534adaa4gd6cag4596g9184g648b206323a1: And if they took him down there... Helm save him.
h37d91310g5318g42a1gb70fgb36b481413ec: They took the Grand Duke to Moonrise Towers.
ha2c85676g8609g436cgae02g3eda1e59082c: The old fortress? Gods, that whole area is cursed.
h6d5ca9b1g6b5bg4ba8gb6a2ged1f3ae28500: I'll pass it up the chain of command - whatever good it'll do for the Grand Duke.
h5150461bg763fg425ega129g0b1e82f830e4: We'll stay put for now. Still might get something out of these tracks.
hc7a34640g89ebg41b7g96c2g38a86d66c0b4: It's a shame they left any survivors. That's poor form.
h1b1e5142g34b5g4191ga5e6g304d594a2c1c: What in the Nine Hells is wrong with you?
h2ecfdb86g79bdg4814gb3dcg51b8db729521: Leave, before I put a sword through you.
h82b3d678g15b4g4435ga305g7fb12f91fb13: I appreciate the offer, but you'd just get in the way.
hebd12912gc76ag43adg82deg641308669a0e: You should get going. And watch for goblins on the road.
hf5ef2468gb963g4d94gbd8ag97842e5f8890: My true kin have no care for surface raids. You can trust me.
h878d707ag9fbeg481cg8dabgab0ad67c34be: Hm. You haven't tried to slit my throat yet...
h93529603ge635g43f5gaf23gc9a7a4e9579b: Can't really tell the difference between you lot, honestly.
h156fd59dg3478g4d61g9d4ega8e0ad854297: You're in my way. Get moving.
ha1569085g6101g4270gbcc9gd25fb94cc07c: If they allied with goblins, they were not Lolth's chosen. Tell me more - now.
h629fe5b6g3430g4e22g8ef8gf9e53338f89b: By my oath, you have my help. But I must to know the truth to assist you.
he61697a6g2a91g4f95gaff2g5ae8517d8a73: There's no need for any of that. Come on, stand up.
hd68185cag4214g4bcdg955eg40fccb7edb06: Oh, stand up. You're embarrassing yourself.
h0eca825cg36a1g4869ga6d1g4f7caaac285e: We should've sent another dozen guards, at least. He's not just any noble, damn it!
hba6c6af1g4aebg4fa2gb876ge6ae4cd1ad83: What do you think you're doing? Stop that!
hb648d477gf02ag465fgb304g78b040c00fe1: I'll blame that trick on simple curiosity. This time.
he821f475g56d3g44fegbed1g8e6fab44761c: Your kind burned the inn to the ground. Even brought goblins along for the fun.
h3d11dd04g2c65g4941g87e7g2d38309256b4: Maybe you need a second pair of eyes. Want me to take a look?
he7d696c9ge3a0g490fga4e0g82ce3076c93f: By all means. Doubt you'll have much luck though.
h73e18cecg376dg49f5g99ddgc2c659851a3c: Most of the tracks were destroyed by the flames.
h34908656g7592g4571gb290g5ce78d1a2771: You might as well give up.
ha910c491gf4aeg4ca3gb999g6decbd17d0c4: And you should just bugger off.
h242a5847g6f4cg461dgac04g7b0fa8aff633: I'll see if I can spot anything.
h3abbff1fg3c62g43e3gb20fgf80a3c854e81: *You notice the telltale clumsiness of goblins, alongside something more light-footed - drow.*
h11fd2ddcgec40g4dedg8e4cg1e0861b7849e: *Your gaze follows the drow footprints around the courtyard and south - out of the inn.*
hedb6a793g6536g41fdg94daga5b16dfea304: That's something. But they could've gone south and then down - towards the Underdark.
h5a4929a2g4c37g4112g93f5gfccc9563f340: We still have no idea where they took the - what they came for.
h4ce5d0c1gd7eeg42c2g9be4g49c7a7eba8cc: What'd I tell you? It's a godsdamned mess.
h2e5a3263g4305g4d8bg96a8gddbe06be9180: Be easier if you weren't bothering me.
hda64d30fg372ag4e28g9270g5c070111a833: *The tracks are a chaotic mess. Gleaning any information from them is impossible.*
h864824e6g9407g4352g97dag0931781939ae: Tracking is what I do. Let me see if I can spot anything.
h2a0c024dg8d18g42beg97cdga668360166f8: You're the one who seems confused.
hd6c4c78eg2c70g47d3g8745gd2918c476911: These tracks should be able to tell us everything that happened here.
h867ad89fgcd30g491agbf4agb9365d982c3d: Wipe away the tracks with your foot.
h9e90e328g83feg413dgad7fge4e03b478c86: Hey, HEY! Stop! You're destroying evidence!
h0ce9d721g1ac5g48feg9230g482b00e0e2ce: Ignore her - keep wiping away the tracks.
h4190a6c3g6bbeg40ebgb5aag3b240e4346cf: What in the Nine Hells did I just tell you?!
hf88e033cgc12ag4901g8d32ga76766018e0f: Evidence for what? Surely you've pieced something together by now.
h1bac74a8gf69fg472eg8357g503d878af520: Watch where you step - these tracks might tell us where the raiders went.
h88a738e7gcb95g481dg84b9g24499deaedee: I found a pack of Zhentarim hiding nearby.
hbf1f394cg3490g46c0g9043g9989eb0a71fa: And? What do you expect me to do about it?
hfcf36fe3g51ecg4df8gb79egd3e025c6ff1f: I don't have the Fists to take on a Zhentarim base. We're stretched thin as it is.
h39fd5766g2399g4e9cg8da1gc26a8686a7b0: Just stay out of their way and hope they stay out of yours.
h51ccb912gfdaag4751gbd1cgff0819e5bb83: Can't you see the inn is burning?!  Help or get out of the way!
hb91689ffg7ca6g4972ga4bdg940b78568678: You're no help just standing there. Help us!
